title: Quluxe Heavy Duty D Shape Chain Locking, M6 6MM Chain Quick Link Connector- Black (Pack of 6)
features: ✅Features: 60 x 30 x 6 mm /2.36 x 1.18 x 0.23 inches(L x W x H); Package Content: 6pcs x Chain Connector Keychain Buckle
✅Material: These quick links are made of iron with black paint antirust process.
✅Easy to Use: Twist clockwise the thread to open and anti-clockwise to close. The smooth threads are very convenient for installation and disassembly .
✅Strong Bearing Capacity: The maximum load capacity of this connector is 100 lbs. Please don't exceed the max load for safety.

✅Application: Chain link perfect for lighting chain, key chain, camping, pets, hiking, fishing, backpack, ropes and so on. (Not for mountaineering, rock climbing, ice climbing and high-altitude games for your safety.)
description: Product specifications Size: 60 x 30 x 6 mm /2.36 x 1.18 x 0.23 inches(L x W x H) Color: Black; Material: Iron Total Weight: 193g Package Include 6pcs x Chain Connector Keychain Buckle If you have any comments on our products or services, please feel free to contact us, we are honored to serve you. Thank you for choosing our products and wish you a happy life!
